title: Manual story 拆分原則 alignment(對齊 Polaris/Carbon/Storybook)
mechanism: DS-wide:Glob 全 70 展示 stories 檔(排除 anatomy/principles),Python 枚舉全 export const:(1) WithStartIcon+WithEndIcon 同軸拆檔 pattern → 0;(2) Default+AllVariants 同檔冗餘 → 0;(3) ≥2 per-variant 拆細(Primary/Secondary/Outline/... 名單)→ 0;(4) 擴大掃 ≥2 With* pair + ≥2 size-split(Small/Medium/Large)→ 5 candidates 逐一讀 body 判軸別
verdict: 0 after 全掃 70 files:5 個 With* pair candidates 全為不同 feature/anatomy 軸(BulkActionBar 功能對、DataTable 組合對、Dialog 組合對、Menu description-vs-prefix 槽、SelectionControl icon-24px-inline vs avatar-32px-block 幾何規則各異),非 rubric 禁的同軸拆分,二次驗證殺掉
